title: Login Activity Time-Series Anomaly
description: Detects anomalous spikes in authentication activity using time-bucketed analysis. Groups login events into hourly buckets and flags hours with significantly more activity than the baseline. Uses timecluster-style analysis to identify burst authentication patterns that may indicate credential stuffing or compromised account usage.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.consolesignon.login' | timestats span = 1hour count as login_count | where login_count > 20
